title: lastrea diaphana
intro: Lastrea diaphana, also known as the delicate lady fern, is a species of fern native to tropical Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lastrea diaphana include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health. The plant is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, with herbal preparations also including the use of its leaves in teas and poultices.
